final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post banner.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile-shot documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 wide horizontal layout with generous negative space for text overlay; skyline as primary horizontal subject
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with gradually brightening neon lights, hurrying pedestrians, and distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban dusk setting with dramatic light-and-shadow contrast, strong sense of real on-scene presence
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic golden-hour-to-neon-transition atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm sunset-meets-cool-neon direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-texture quality — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary title, bold/modern typeface, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (subtitle, secondary), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right or bottom area)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal framing; must leave sufficient clear areas for text overlays; all three text elements must be placed as specified
Avoid:
